acceptance_criteria: 1) RLM preview rendering no longer hand-recurses BamlValue trees. 2) Conversion boundary is unified with core bamltype/Facet conversion path. 3) Error/schema rendering duplication in RLM submit path is reduced and behavior stays parity-tested.
description: Post-V1.0 cleanup: replace manual RLM traversal/conversion infrastructure with existing Facet-based primitives and shared bamltype conversion paths. Target areas: preview rendering, Python kwargs conversion boundary, schema/type error rendering.
design: Use facet-reflect Peek for preview rendering over typed input structures. Converge submit conversion path onto shared typed conversion boundary rather than custom TypeIR recursion where possible. Reuse shared schema/type-name rendering utilities to avoid drift.
title: Facet consolidation: remove parallel RLM type-walking paths
